scenario_instances.assertion: FindServers and GetEndpoints responses match profile and endpoint filters
Browse, BrowseNext, and TranslateBrowsePathsToNodeIds return expected results
Claim-ready Write value, StatusCode, and timestamp cases are covered; IndexRange remains unsupported under S071-D1
ActivateSession change-user state transition is covered
scenario_instances.state_invariant: Successful change-user updates the Session user and server nonce; rejected attempts leave the existing Session user and nonce unchanged.

scenario_instances.assertion: Diagnostics nodes and returnDiagnostics are covered
Malformed or truncated requests fail with cited StatusCodes
scenario_instances.state_invariant: Malformed or truncated requests do not mutate address-space values, Session user identity, diagnostics claims, or profile claim state.

scenario_instances.assertion: Each disabled dedicated CU independently removes its behavior and claim without disabling unrelated enabled CUs
scenario_instances.state_invariant: Disabled CU paths leave unrelated behavior, manifest claims, generated profile defaults, address-space values, Session user identity, nonce, and diagnostics counters unchanged except for explicit rejected-request counters when diagnostics are enabled.

scenario_instances.assertion: Boundary counts and browse path depths are bounded
scenario_instances.state_invariant: Excessive counts and exhausted continuation points do not overflow fixed buffers or partially mutate target state.

scenario_instances.assertion: Invalid write targets, attributes, and types fail explicitly; deferred IndexRange writes return Bad_WriteNotSupported
scenario_instances.state_invariant: Invalid or unsupported Write operations return per-operation failures and leave the target value, StatusCode, timestamps, and array elements unchanged.

scenario_instances.assertion: Nano defaults and independent custom-profile dedicated CU overrides are preserved
